plastic-washers.categoryZh: 塑料平垫 / 垫片系列
plastic-washers.usageZh: 用于紧固连接、密封隔离、绝缘防护、间隔定位、缓冲减震等装配场景。
plastic-washers.usageEn: Used for fastening, sealing, insulation, spacing, positioning and cushioning applications.

automotive-plastic-parts.usageZh: 用于汽车内外饰、卡扣固定、线束保护、支架安装、电气外壳和防护盖板等场景。
automotive-plastic-parts.usageEn: Used for automotive trim, clips, wire harness protection, mounting brackets, electrical housings and protective covers.

pet-plastic-products.usageZh: 用于宠物喂养、饮水、清洁、出行、笼具、玩具和护理用品的塑料结构件与配件。
pet-plastic-products.usageEn: Used for plastic structural parts and fittings in pet feeding, watering, cleaning, travel, cages, toys and care products.

furniture-plastic-fittings.usageZh: 用于家具脚塞、管塞、孔盖、装饰盖、连接扣件、防滑保护和端部封口等场景。
furniture-plastic-fittings.usageEn: Used for furniture foot plugs, tube inserts, hole caps, decorative caps, connectors, anti-slip protection and end sealing.

electronic-electrical-plastic-parts.categoryZh: 电子电器塑料配件系列
electronic-electrical-plastic-parts.usageZh: 用于电子电器外壳、绝缘件、支架、端盖、保护盖、开关配件和仪器仪表壳体等场景。
electronic-electrical-plastic-parts.usageEn: Used for electronic and electrical housings, insulating parts, brackets, end caps, protective covers, switch fittings and instrument enclosures.
